meta.title: Combat Controllers vs. TACPs: What’s the Difference? | Dan Horgan
meta.description:
Dan has an extensive background as an TACP, retiring after 24 years in the Air Force. He also served as a detective with the Baltimore police; service is clearly a staple of his life. Stay tuned for more from Dan on what it took to become a TACP in the first place.

Learn more about Air Force special operations here: https://www.sandboxx.us/news/air-force-special-operations-prep-course-gets-a-revamp/ 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
Facebook: https://facebook.com/sandboxxnews
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@sandboxxnews

📱 Find Dan on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/horgandaniel/ 
Find him on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan_horgan_/ 

Video Chapters:

00:00 – Introduction
00:21 – What does a TACP do?
01:22 – What does a Combat Controller do?
03:02 – The blurry line dividing the two
03:43  – Which one should I try out for?
